Title: Costa, Enrico
Overview: Pupil of Morelli and correspondent with Bernard Berenson.
Sources: Berenson, Bernard. The Selected Letters of Bernard Berenson. Edited by A. K McComb. London: Hutchinson, 1963. p. 10 [mentioned]; Berenson, Bernard. Sketch for a Self-Portrait. New York: Pantheom, 1949, p. 51.
